title: linum squarrosum subsp. maroccanum
intro: Linum squarrosum subsp. maroccanum, also known as Moroccan flax or Moroccan linseed, is a subspecies of the linum squarrosum plant, which is a flowering plant in the family Linaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of mucilages, which have been used to soothe and protect the mucous membranes. The health benefits of Linum squarrosum subsp. maroccanum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive issues, and support the immune system. Linum squarrosum subsp. maroccanum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and salves, and can be consumed as a supplement after proper processing.
